formal_policy.P1_graphs: use the exact processed graph interfaces used by MonoGST+ and GPU4GST
formal_policy.P1_queries: use every author query; no subsampling; preserve query blocks internally but report one aggregate row per graph
formal_policy.P2_queries: related-group BFS candidates on six GPU4GST author graphs; select five per graph/g cell from five input-size rank strata without solver feedback
formal_policy.controlled_queries: MonoGST+ Gaussian-size and uniform-vertex protocol on DBLP-MonoGSTPlus and IMDb-latest-20260722
formal_policy.query_validity: generated P2/S2 and gate queries must have a common intersecting component; published P1 queries are retained in full and known-infeasible rows are audited explicitly
formal_policy.same_name_graphs: DBLP-MonoGSTPlus and DBLP-GPU4GST remain separate identities regardless of similar counts
formal_policy.method_selection: ABHSS base and enhanced are fixed configurations of one executable; configuration is frozen before a query batch and no per-query oracle is allowed
formal_policy.future_experiments: ablations and approximation-quality comparisons are not enabled in this freeze

graph_loading.implementation: shared 8 MiB buffered numeric scanner; solver then performs exact-degree adjacency reservation and one O(n+m) connected-component index build, while the offline feasibility audit streams edges into a DSU
graph_loading.semantic_contract: preserve original edge order, edge_id, per-vertex adjacency insertion order and finite-double conversion; reject trailing graph tokens
graph_loading.query_feasibility: reuse the immutable component index; connected graphs cost O(total query memberships), disconnected graphs intersect sorted per-group component sets
graph_loading.timing_policy: engineering metrics only; excluded from solver query time and algorithmic speedup

build_policy.optimization: Release -O2 (or MSVC /O2); enable IPO/LTO uniformly for repository performance targets only when the toolchain reports support
build_policy.old_libstdcxx_compatibility: fall back from floating std::from_chars to strtod when the compile-and-link probe fails

solver_output_contract.mask_vertex_states: ABHSS counts distinct D/A/H (mask,v) states when first admitted to a row workspace; PrunedDP++ counts distinct entries actually inserted into StateStore; both exclude group-distance/route/tour/dual preprocessing, duplicate queue items and full-mask completion candidates
solver_output_contract.paper_guardrail: do not claim that the current artifact outputs the tree unless decision reconstruction is implemented and tested

required_source_archives.name: MonoGST+ author workload
required_source_archives.redistribution_note: the accepted manuscript and author data are not assumed redistributable; publish hashes and acquisition instructions unless permission is obtained

correctness_gate_dependencies.name: GroupSteinerTree / Basic+
correctness_gate_dependencies.redistribution_note: upstream repository has no repository-level license file

reporting_requirements: CPU model, physical cores, RAM, OS, compiler and Release build
one compute thread per solver process
per-query 10000-second timeout and a common graph-load convention
P1: one row per graph with total queries, solved, timeout, error and total time
P1 observed total time is shown only if all queries finish; otherwise show solved time and capped total budget
P2/S2: solved count, PAR-2, mutually solved speedup, timeout direction, objective agreement, peak RSS and completed-query mask_vertex_states
state-count ratios use mutually solved pairs with positive counts; do not impute counts for timeout/error queries
all available exact methods must agree on objective value before a performance claim is used
